lead_captured.name: Lead Captured
lead_captured.description: Sent when a visitor submits their contact details (owner opted in). Placeholders: {owner_name}, {lead_name}, {lead_email}, {session_id}, {slug}, {chat_url}, {owner_url}.
lead_captured.subject: New lead on your AI profile
lead_captured.body_html:
Hi {owner_name},

A visitor on your AI profile just shared their contact details.

Lead details

{lead_name}

{lead_email}

Profile: {slug}
Session: {session_id}

View ProfileOwner Portal

You received this because you opted in to lead notifications.
Manage your preferences at owner preferences.

donation_received.name: Donation Received
donation_received.description: Sent when an admin confirms receipt of a voluntary donation. Placeholders: {owner_name}, {amount}, {donation_id}, {confirmed_at}, {support_email}, {owner_url}.
donation_received.subject: Thank you for your donation — ₹{amount} received!
donation_received.body_html:
Hi {owner_name},

Thank you so much for your generous contribution! We've confirmed receipt of your donation.

Donation confirmed

₹{amount}

Reference: {donation_id}
Confirmed on: {confirmed_at}

Your support matters! Every contribution helps us keep the platform free and continuously improving.

Go to Owner Portal

Questions? Contact us at {support_email}

unanswered_question.name: Unanswered Question
unanswered_question.description: Sent when a visitor asks a question the AI could not answer (owner opted in). Placeholders: {owner_name}, {question}, {session_id}, {slug}, {chat_url}, {owner_url}.
unanswered_question.subject: Unanswered question on your AI profile
unanswered_question.body_html:
Hi {owner_name},

A visitor asked a question your AI profile couldn't answer.

Question asked

{question}

Profile: {slug}
Session: {session_id}

Tip: Add content to your profile documents to help your AI answer questions like this in future.

Try Your ProfileOwner Portal

You received this because you opted in to unanswered-question alerts.
Manage your preferences at owner preferences.

incomplete_profile.name: Incomplete Profile
incomplete_profile.description: Sent to the profile owner (unconditionally) when a visitor tries to chat but no documents have been uploaded. Placeholders: {owner_name}, {slug}, {chat_url}, {owner_url}, {support_email}.
incomplete_profile.subject: Action needed — your AI profile has no documents
incomplete_profile.body_html:
Hi {owner_name},

A visitor just tried to chat with your AI profile — but it isn't ready yet. No documents have been uploaded, so there's nothing for the AI to answer from.

Action required

Upload your profile documents and click Index Documents to activate your AI profile.

Profile: {slug}

Steps to get ready:

  1. Log in to your Owner Portal
  2. Upload your documents (resume, bio, case studies, etc.)
  3. Click Index Documents

Go to Owner Portal

Need help? Contact us at {support_email}

payment_receipt.name: Payment Receipt
payment_receipt.description: Sent when an admin confirms a Paid Individual plan invoice payment. Placeholders: {owner_name}, {amount}, {invoice_id}, {period_start}, {period_end}, {paid_at}, {support_email}, {owner_url}.
payment_receipt.subject: Payment confirmed — ₹{amount} received
payment_receipt.body_html:
Hi {owner_name},

Your payment for the Paid Individual plan has been confirmed. Here are your receipt details.

Payment confirmed

₹{amount}

Invoice: {invoice_id}
Period: {period_start} to {period_end}
Paid on: {paid_at}

Your plan is active. Thank you for your continued support of the platform.

Go to Owner Portal

Questions? Contact us at {support_email}
